sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GeneDx (WGS) CEO exercises 80K RSUs, sells 47K shares for taxes
feed.summary: GeneDx Holdings Corp. CEO Katherine Stueland exercised 80,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) and subsequently sold 46,933 shares to cover tax withholding obligations. These "sell to cover" transactions were non-discretionary and executed at weighted average prices between $60.93 and $65.61 per share. After these transactions, the CEO beneficially owns 91,514 shares of Class A common stock, along with additional RSUs and stock options.

feed.title: GeneDx (WGS) CFO exercises 16,250 RSUs, sells shares for taxes
feed.summary: GeneDx Holdings Corp.'s CFO, Kevin Feeley, exercised 16,250 restricted stock units (RSUs) and subsequently sold 8,818 Class A Common Stock shares. These sales, conducted at weighted average prices between $60s and $65s per share, were explicitly for covering tax withholding obligations associated with the RSU vesting, categorized as a "sell to cover" transaction rather than a discretionary trade. Following these transactions, Feeley beneficially owns 34,580 Class A Common Stock shares, with additional contingent rights to 93,173 RSU shares and options for 25,906 shares.

feed.title: Raymond James Maintains Weave Communications(WEAV.US) With Buy Rating
feed.summary: This article provides details on Raymond James maintaining its Buy rating for Weave Communications (WEAV.US). The report also includes the price target set by the analyst firm.

feed.title: WEBTOON (NASDAQ: WBTN) sets salary and equity for its president
feed.summary: WEBTOON Entertainment Inc. disclosed the compensation package for its President, Yongsoo Kim, through an amended 8-K filing. Mr. Kim's compensation includes an annual base salary of approximately $500,000, a $500,000 short-term incentive opportunity, and long-term equity incentives comprising $750,000 each in restricted stock units and performance stock units. These terms were formalized in an amended long-term assignment letter effective March 2, 2026, and approved by the Board on March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Washington Trust Bancorp (WASH) Initiated at Neutral by Piper Sandler amid Capital Constraints
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has initiated coverage of Washington Trust Bancorp (NASDAQ: WASH) with a Neutral rating and a $32 price target, citing capital constraints that limit growth and push share buybacks lower on the priority list. Despite this, the company is making strategic investments in Wealth Management and Commercial Banking, including acquisitions and new hires, and plans to open a new branch in Pawtucket, Rhode Island. The bank reported strong Q4 2025 results with increased net income and net interest income, and an improved net interest margin due to a better funding mix.

feed.summary: This article provides current stock price information and trading conditions for Werner Enterprises Inc (WERN) on Capital.com, a platform for CFD and Knock-out trading. feed.title: Insider sells multiple VTS shares reported in Form 144 (NYSE: VTS)
feed.summary: Vitesse Energy (NYSE: VTS) recently reported insider sales via Form 144, detailing multiple open-market dispositions by Brian Cree, including sales of 43,216 shares on January 14, 2026, and 19,824 shares on January 16, 2026. The filing indicates these are routine dispositions with no clear material signal or offering, and the proceeds go to the seller rather than the issuer. As of March 30, 2026, VTS had 39,776,727 shares outstanding.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Initiates Coverage on WAY: Equal-Weight, $28 PT
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has initiated coverage on Waystar Holding (WAY) with an Equal-Weight rating and a price target of $28. This new analyst coverage adds to existing ratings, with other firms like Deutsche Bank and Wells Fargo having previously issued Buy or Overweight ratings with varying price targets. Waystar Holding is a cloud technology provider for healthcare organizations, and the average target price from 21 analysts is $36.52, implying a significant upside from its current price.

feed.title: VUG ETF Declines 0.6%
feed.summary: This article reports that the VUG ETF declined by 0.6%. This brief update highlights the fund's performance.

feed.title: VERI: HC Wainwright Reiterates Buy Rating and $9 Price Target
feed.summary: HC Wainwright & Co. has reiterated its Buy rating for Veritone, Inc. (VERI), maintaining a price target of $9.00 USD. This aligns with a history of consistent Buy ratings from various analysts for the AI computing solutions provider. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $9.63 for VERI, suggesting a significant upside from its current share price.

feed.title: Walker & Dunlop Arranges Joint Venture Equity Partnership and Construction Financing for $132 Million Multifamily Development in Richmond's Scott's Addition District
feed.summary: Walker & Dunlop has facilitated a joint venture and secured construction financing for a $132 million multifamily development in Richmond, Virginia's Scott's Addition District. The project, a redevelopment of the former Greyhound Bus Station, will deliver 386 Class A residences and over 14,000 square feet of retail. This initiative aims to enhance the rapidly growing neighborhood with a world-class residential experience, urban retail, and extensive amenities.

feed.title: WD Investors Have Opportunity to Join Walker & Dunlop, Inc. Fraud Investigation with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is investigating potential securities law violations by Walker & Dunlop, Inc. following a significant drop in its adjusted earnings per share for Q4 2025, which were nearly 81% below consensus estimates. This news led to a more than 19.4% decline in the company's stock on the day of the announcement. Shareholders who incurred losses are encouraged to contact the firm for a fraud investigation.

feed.title: Is WD-40’s (WDFC) Bigger Dividend and Specialist Push Redefining Its Capital Allocation Playbook?
feed.summary: WD-40 Company recently declared a higher quarterly dividend of US$1.02 per share and highlighted the growth of its higher-margin Specialist offerings and e-commerce channels. This move suggests a continued focus on shareholder returns while the company invests in premium products and digital platforms. The article examines whether this increased dividend and emphasis on specialist products redefine WD-40’s investment strategy, considering potential risks like cost inflation and slower traction in new initiatives.

feed.title: VRME: Revenue fell sharply in 2025 amid a shipping partner transition, but gross margin improved
feed.summary: VerifyMe, Inc. (VRME) experienced a sharp decline in revenue and customer base in 2025 due to a significant shipping partner transition. Despite this, the company saw an improvement in gross margin and an increase in Adjusted EBITDA year-over-year. VRME is currently working on a merger and is focused on enhancing its operational efficiency.

feed.title: Director James Caruso receives 40,000 VTAK options at $1.15 exercise price
feed.summary: Catheter Precision, Inc. director James Joseph Caruso received a grant of 40,000 stock options (VTAK) with an exercise price of $1.15 per share. These options are set to expire on March 26, 2036, and will vest entirely on the 180-day anniversary of the grant date. This transaction was reported via an SEC Form 4 filing and represents a compensation-related award rather than an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Catheter Precision (VTAK) director receives 40,000 stock options at $1.15 strike
feed.summary: Catheter Precision director Arno Andrew was granted 40,000 stock options with an exercise price of $1.15 per share, expiring on March 26, 2036. The options vest 100% after 180 days from the grant date, representing a standard equity incentive for director compensation. This transaction is categorized as a grant or award rather than an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: [6-K] VOX ROYALTY CORP. Current Report (Foreign Issuer)
feed.summary: Vox Royalty Corp. (VOXR) filed a Form 6-K, a current report for foreign private issuers, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on March 30, 2026. The report indicates that Vox Royalty Corp. is a foreign private issuer submitting annual reports under cover of Form 40-F. The filing includes a press release as Exhibit 99.1.

feed.title: VWO ETF Declines 0.1%
feed.summary: The Vanguard FTSE Emerging Markets ETF (VWO) experienced a slight decline of 0.1% in trading on the New York Stock Exchange. The ETF had an average daily volume of 18,367,314 shares and is currently trading near its 52-week low.

feed.title: Short Interest in Valhi, Inc. (NYSE:VHI) Grows By 24.3%
feed.summary: Short interest in Valhi, Inc. (NYSE:VHI) significantly increased by 24.3% in March to 67,454 shares, representing a 3.1-day ratio of short interest and about 0.2% of the company's shares sold short. This rise comes after Valhi reported a substantial quarterly earnings miss, posting an EPS of ($1.86) against a $0.86 consensus, alongside negative net margin and return on equity. The company declared a $0.08 quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a consensus "Sell" rating with a $12 price target, contrasting with the current trading price around $14.22.

feed.title: Truist cuts Vornado Realty stock price target on lower FFO estimate
feed.summary: Truist Securities has lowered its price target for Vornado Realty Trust (NYSE:VNO) to $28 from $29, while maintaining a Hold rating. This adjustment follows a reduction in Truist's 2026 FFO estimate for Vornado to $2.25 per share, below the consensus, due to seasonality in signage revenue and other factors. Despite the stock trading near its 52-week low and a 38% decline over six months, InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be undervalued, and the company offers a 2.99% dividend yield with a 36-year history of payments.

feed.title: Village Farms Extends FCC Credit Facility to 2031, Cuts Interest Margin by 50 Bps
feed.summary: Village Farms International has amended its credit agreement with Farm Credit Canada, extending the maturity to February 3, 2031, and reducing the interest margin by 50 basis points. This move is expected to decrease borrowing costs and improve the company's financial flexibility. The updated terms support Village Farms' long-term liquidity needs.

feed.title: Village Farms cuts loan rate and gains four extra years on $15.4M debt
feed.summary: Village Farms International (NASDAQ: VFF) has amended and extended its Farm Credit Canada loan, reducing the interest rate by 50 basis points and extending the maturity date by four years to February 3, 2031. The variable-rate loan has a current balance of US $15.4 million, with an interest rate currently below 7.0%. Management views this amendment as a reflection of a strong lender relationship and a supportive step for the company's growth strategy in 2026.

feed.title: VECT - Vectivbio Holding Ag Latest Stock News & Market Updates

It features high-quality news articles, expert summaries from Rhea-AI detailing their impact and sentiment, and end-of-day stock performance summaries. The content covers various company events including management changes, tender offers, acquisition updates, financial results, and clinical trial progress for its lead product, apraglutide.

feed.title: New CFO named at Telefônica Brasil (NYSE: VIV) as predecessor moves to UK role
feed.summary: Telefônica Brasil (NYSE: VIV) has appointed Rodrigo Rossi Monari as its new Chief Financial and Investor Relations Officer, effective April 2, 2026. He replaces David Melcon Sanchez‑Friera, who is transitioning to a CFO role at VMED O2 UK Limited, a joint venture involving Telefónica, S.A. This change marks an orderly succession within the broader Telefónica group, ensuring continuity in the company's executive leadership.

feed.title: Vital Farms Faces Class Action Lawsuit Over ERP System Delays
feed.summary: Vital Farms is facing a class action lawsuit alleging that the company misled investors about the risks and impact of delays related to its new enterprise resource planning (ERP) system. The lawsuit, filed by Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C., claims that Vital Farms downplayed the issues, leading to missed earnings and investor losses. Investors who purchased Vital Farms securities between May 8, 2025, and February 26, 2026, have until May 26, 2026, to apply to be lead plaintiff.

feed.title: USA Compression (NYSE: USAC) shows pro forma impact of $912M J-W Power deal
feed.summary: USA Compression Partners (NYSE: USAC) filed an amended report detailing the pro forma impact of its $912 million J-W Power acquisition, which closed in January 2026. The acquisition, valued at approximately $911.6 million (half cash, half equity), is expected to increase net income attributable to common unitholders to $127.2 million for 2025 on a pro forma basis, with basic earnings per unit rising to $0.92. The report includes J-W Energy's audited 2025 financial statements and outlines how purchase accounting adjustments, such as increased property, equipment, goodwill, and long-term debt, affect USA Compression's financial outlook.

feed.title: VICI Properties Inc. (VICI) Just Overtook the 20-Day Moving Average
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. (VICI) has surpassed its 20-day moving average, a technical indicator often viewed as a bullish signal. This movement suggests potential upward momentum for the stock, prompting investors to consider its recent performance and valuation. The article advises evaluating factors beyond this single indicator to make informed investment decisions.

feed.title: Truist maintains Insulet Corporation (PODD) buy rating despite device correction announcement
feed.summary: Truist has reiterated its Buy rating on Insulet Corporation (PODD) following the company's announcement of a global field safety correction for its Omnipod 5 Automated Insulin Delivery System. The correction addresses a software issue that could lead to over-delivery of insulin, but Truist believes the impact on Insulet's financials, new patient starts, and market share loss will be minimal given the low historical incidence rate of the flaw and the company's proactive communication.

feed.title: Boston Scientific Just Took A 9% Header. Why Analysts Are Still Bullish.
feed.summary: Boston Scientific's stock (BSX) plummeted 9% to a two-year low after mixed test results for its Watchman FLX device, which prevents strokes. Despite the significant drop, analysts remain bullish on the medical device company, indicating confidence in the product's long-term potential or other aspects of the business. The Watchman FLX is a minimally invasive device designed to seal off the heart's left atrial appendage, where most blood clots form.

feed.title: Conagra Brands Inc Stock Faces Analyst Pressure Amid Earnings Anticipation and Sector Headwinds
feed.summary: Conagra Brands Inc (CAG) is facing significant analyst pressure, with Deutsche Bank and Jefferies notably cutting price targets due to ongoing inflation and supply chain disruptions ahead of its Q3 2026 earnings report. The company navigates a complex consumer packaged goods landscape, marked by a negative P/E ratio and a downward stock trend, despite high institutional ownership. Investors are closely watching the upcoming earnings for insights into cost mitigation strategies and performance within a competitive sector.

feed.title: Is Danaher’s BIO-Europe Spring Focus Sharpening Its Life Sciences Edge or Simply Polishing the Story (DHR)?
feed.summary: Danaher Corporation recently presented at BIO-Europe Spring 2026, highlighting its life sciences tools and diagnostics capabilities. While this presentation offers visibility, the company's near-term demand is still tied to early-stage biotech recovery and policy pressures in China. Danaher's investment narrative projects significant revenue and earnings growth by 2028, with a fair value estimate suggesting a substantial upside.

feed.title: How Alexandria’s FTSE All-World Index Removal At Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE: ARE) was removed from the FTSE All-World Index on March 21, 2026, which could impact its passive investment flows. While this doesn't fundamentally change the company's business drivers, it highlights the influence of index tracking on trading activity. Investors should consider how this removal might affect Alexandria's appeal to passive investors, alongside its core real estate fundamentals, and its efforts to manage debt and improve profitability.

feed.title: Company (NYSE: VEL) insider plans sale of 14,840 shares via broker
feed.summary: An insider at Velocity Financial, Inc. (NYSE: VEL) has filed a Form 144 to sell 14,840 shares, stemming from restricted stock awards and performance stock units. The filing details a proposed sale of 5,160 shares valued at $93,213.82 through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC on March 17, 2026, as part of a 10b5-1 plan. This insider activity indicates a planned security transaction by a company executive.

feed.title: AVAX-backed VanEck Avalanche ETF (NASDAQ: VAVX) outlines structure, fees and staking
feed.summary: The VanEck Avalanche ETF (VAVX) has detailed its structure, fees, and staking mechanisms in its annual report. The Trust aims to track AVAX's price and staking rewards, less expenses, holding AVAX with institutional custodians and calculating its daily NAV using the MarketVector Avalanche Benchmark Rate. It charges a 0.20% Sponsor Fee, utilizes staking services with Coinbase Crypto Services, and handles creations/redemptions in 25,000-Share Baskets as a grantor trust for tax purposes.

feed.title: [424B2] UBS AG Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to the common stock of Charter Communications, Inc., maturing around April 3, 2028. These notes provide periodic contingent coupons if the underlying stock's closing level meets a coupon barrier, and are automatically called if it reaches or exceeds an initial level. Investors face downside market risk, potentially losing principal if the final level falls below a specified downside threshold, and all payments are subject to UBS’s creditworthiness.

feed.title: Journal of Urology Publishes ENVISION Trial Results Showing 72.2% 24-Month Duration of Response with ZUSDURI
feed.summary: UroGen Pharma Ltd. announced the publication of pivotal Phase 3 ENVISION trial results for ZUSDURI™ (mitomycin) in The Journal of Urology. The study demonstrated a 72.2% probability of remaining event-free at 24 months after achieving a complete response at three months in adults with recurrent low-grade intermediate-risk non-muscle invasive bladder cancer (LG-IR-NMIBC). ZUSDURI, the first FDA-approved therapy for this condition, offers a non-surgical treatment potentially breaking the cycle of repeated recurrences and surgeries.

feed.title: Rule 144: Richard D. Peterson sells 1,855 shares (UVE)
feed.summary: Richard D. Peterson, affiliated with Universal Insurance Holdings, Inc. (UVE), filed a Rule 144 notice to sell restricted common stock. The filing discloses a Restricted Stock Award of 2,000 shares granted on June 10, 2022, and indicates that 1,855 shares were sold on December 30, 2025. This is a routine administrative filing for the disposition of previously issued restricted shares.

feed.title: Medford Hawk offers $5.50 to buy Urgent.ly (NASDAQ: ULY)
feed.summary: Medford Hawk, a wholly owned subsidiary of Agero, Inc., has launched a tender offer to acquire all outstanding shares of Urgent.ly (NASDAQ: ULY) for $5.50 per share in cash. This offer is detailed in a Schedule TO filing, which incorporates an Offer to Purchase dated March 30, 2026, and an Agreement and Plan of Merger dated March 13, 2026. As of March 26, 2026, Urgent.ly had 2,196,934 shares outstanding, along with various equity awards.

feed.title: TXMD: Net loss narrowed and license revenue surged as strategic alternatives are explored
feed.summary: TherapeuticsMD (TXMD) reported a narrowed net loss from continuing operations to $(0.7) million for 2025, while license revenue significantly increased by 71.6% to $3.0 million. The company is actively evaluating strategic alternatives but faces risks related to licensee performance, regulatory changes, and ongoing disputes. This financial improvement comes as TXMD explores its long-term strategic direction.

feed.title: TherapeuticsMD (NASDAQ: TXMD) reports 2025 results, weighs strategic options
feed.summary: TherapeuticsMD (NASDAQ: TXMD) reported its full-year 2025 financial results, showing a net loss of $(0.7) million and license revenues of $3.0 million, an increase of 71.6% from 2024. The company, which transitioned to a pharmaceutical royalty business in December 2022, is actively evaluating strategic alternatives including mergers, acquisitions, or asset sales. TherapeuticsMD emphasizes risks associated with licensee performance, ongoing disputes, and its ability to maintain its Nasdaq listing.

feed.title: TXMD: 2025 saw improved results from royalty revenue, but litigation and liquidity risks threaten viability
feed.summary: TherapeuticsMD (TXMD) transitioned to a royalty-only model in 2025, reporting $3.0M in license revenue but also a net loss of $569K. The company faces significant going concern doubts due to ongoing litigation with Mayne Pharma and its reliance on royalty income. Future sustainability hinges on securing additional financing and growing its royalty streams.

feed.title: Ubiquiti Inc (UI) Trading Down 5.12% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Ubiquiti Inc (UI) shares dropped 5.12% on March 30, closing at $740.00 after hitting an intraday low of $727.22. The stock is 13.35% below its 52-week high but 190.20% above its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Hold" status with an average target price of $623.50, suggesting a potential downside of 15.74% from current levels.

feed.title: Unity Software Inc (U) Shares Up 5.45% on Mar 30
feed.summary: Unity Software Inc. (U) shares rose by 5.45% to $20.51 on March 30, trading 60.67% below its 52-week high and 33.79% above its 52-week low. Wall Street analysts predict an average target price of $33.88, implying a 65.17% upside, with a consensus "Outperform" rating. GuruFocus estimates a fair value (GF Value) of $29.30, suggesting a 42.86% upside from the current price.

feed.title: Direxion Daily TSLA Bull 2X Shares Options Spot-On: On March 30th, 86,788 Contracts Were Traded, With 805.22K Open Interest
feed.summary: On March 30th ET, Direxion Daily TSLA Bull 2X Shares (TSLL.US) saw significant options trading with 86,788 contracts traded, comprised of 27.44% put options and 72.56% call options. The open interest for TSLL totaled approximately 805.22K contracts, representing 94.19% of the average over the past 30 trading days. A notable transaction involved 1,100 put options with a strike price of $13.00 expiring on May 8th, 2026, generating $247.5K in turnover when TSLL was trading at $11.48.

feed.title: TIM posts audited 2025 annual report after SEC and Brazil filing
feed.summary: TIM S.A. (NYSE: TIMB) announced the filing of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with both the U.S. SEC and the Brazilian CVM on March 30, 2026. This report includes audited financial statements, Sarbanes-Oxley certifications, and an audit opinion from Ernst & Young on the financial statements and internal controls. Shareholders can access the document online or request a free hard copy from Investor Relations.

feed.title: TIM S.A. Shareholders Back 2025 Results and Governance Changes at 2026 General Meetings
feed.summary: TIM S.A. shareholders have overwhelmingly approved the company's 2025 financial statements, profit allocation, and several governance changes during its 2026 General Meetings. These changes included amendments to the company's by-laws and the appointment of new board and fiscal council members. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates TIMB as "Outperform" due to its strong financial performance, despite some weaknesses in cash conversion and balance sheet trends.

feed.title: According to the latest filing disclosed by the SEC, existing shareholders of biopharmaceutical company Tempest Therapeutics Inc. plan to resell up to 8.27 million shares of the company's common stock.
feed.summary: Existing shareholders of biopharmaceutical company Tempest Therapeutics Inc. plan to resell up to 8.27 million shares of common stock, as disclosed in a recent SEC filing. This move is a proactive effort by the selling shareholders to exit partial investments, with the company itself not receiving any direct financing proceeds from the resale. Tempest Therapeutics, an oncology therapeutic company, noted that the specific transactions will occur based on market conditions, potentially drawing attention to its capital structure.
